verdicts.description: One verdict per decision point, echoing its key.

key.description: The exact key of the decision point being answered.

action.description: letterbox = keep the full width so the side text/graphics stays in frame; crop = follow the speaker (the band is just background).

coverage.description: If letterbox, the fraction of source width (0.0-1.0) that must stay visible to keep the text/graphics. 0 if crop.

reason.description: Brief justification (what you saw in the thumbnail).
